summary: E-commerce app selling Uttarakhandi willow bats at 600 rupees
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner image showing traditional Uttarakhandi willow bat craftsmanship with natural wood texture (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Product photo of classic Uttarakhandi willow cricket bat on white background (bat-classic.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo of premium Uttarakhandi willow cricket bat with leather grip (bat-premium.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo of professional grade Uttarakhandi willow cricket bat (bat-professional.dim_600x600.png)
- Small icon of cricket bat for cart and navigation (bat-icon.dim_64x64.png)

existing_features.title: Create a product catalog displaying Uttarakhandi willow cricket bats with images, descriptions, and specifications
Display fixed price of ₹600 for all bats in the catalog
Implement shopping cart functionality allowing users to add bats and view cart totals
Create checkout flow capturing customer name, delivery address, and phone number
Apply a creative, traditional Indian marketplace visual theme with warm, earthy colors and elegant typography that reflects the craftsmanship of Uttarakhandi products
Render generated product images for Uttarakhandi willow bats as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated

new_feature_requests.summary: Display product catalog of Uttarakhandi willow bats
Show fixed price of 600 rupees for all bats
Store bat product data (name, description, image reference, price) in backend with query and list methods
Store completed orders in backend with customer details, items purchased, quantities, and total amount
